question: What is the relation between the man and the guitar on the left in the image? Select from the following options: (A) There is no relation between the man and the guitar. (B) The man is holding the guitar for someone else. (C) The guitar is in front of the man. (D) The man is playing the guitar.
gold_answer: There is no relation between the man and the guitar
answer_choices: There is no relation between the man and the guitar
The man is holding the guitar for someone else
The guitar is in front of the man
The man is playing the guitar
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
